FSM_TRANSITIONS

Assignment of the allowed events for an FSM state.

Columns
ftr_fst_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Primary key, reference to FSM_STATUS.

ftr_fev_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Primary key, reference to FSM_EVENTS.

ftr_fcl_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Primary key, reference to FSM_CLASSES.

ftr_fsc_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Primary key, reference to FSM_SUB_CLASSES, defaults to MASTER.

ftr_fst_list (`varchar2(1000 char)`)

List of possible result states as a colon-separated list of FSM_STATUS.FST_ID values.

ftr_active (according to `pit_util.flag_type`)

Flag indicating whether an assignment should be used.

ftr_required_role (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Optional role restriction for an event.

ftr_raise_automatically (according to `pit_util.flag_type`)

Flag indicating whether the event is triggered automatically after a status is reached.

ftr_raise_on_status (`number`)

Defines which result state triggers the following event. Allowed values: 0 = normal processing, 1 = error processing.

Dependencies
ftr_fev_id, ftr_fcl_id

references FSM_EVENTS (fev_id, fev_fcl_id)

ftr_fst_id, ftr_fcl_id

references FSM_STATUS (fst_id, fst_fcl_id)

ftr_fcl_id

references FSM_CLASSES (fcl_id)

ftr_fsc_id, ftr_fcl_id

references FSM_SUB_CLASSES (fsc_id, fsc_fcl_id)
